description: Test suite for ohos-test-fuzz-generation skill - generating FUZZ test cases for C/C++ projects with security code review and semantic corpus generation

evals.prompt: 帮我为RSInterfaces类生成fuzz测试用例
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger and begin fuzz generation workflow

evals.prompt: 我需要创建一个fuzzer，测试DisplayManager的安全性
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger for fuzzer creation request

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger and enter rule check workflow (phase 5)

evals.prompt: 为这个类编写fuzz_test，类名是ConfigManager
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger for fuzz_test keyword

evals.prompt: 这个LLVMFuzzerTestOneInput函数的实现有问题，帮我检查一下
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger for LLVMFuzzerTestOneInput keyword

evals.prompt: 帮我检查这个*_fuzzer.cpp文件是否符合规范
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger for *_fuzzer.cpp file reference

evals.prompt: fuzztest/目录下的测试代码需要更新，帮我修改
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger for fuzztest/ directory reference

evals.prompt: 为这个fuzzer生成语义化种子数据（corpus）
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger and jump to phase 4 (seed generation)

evals.prompt: 生成fuzz测试的合规报告
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger and jump to report generation phase

evals.prompt: 帮我写ConfigManager类的单元测试
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger - unit test, not fuzz test

evals.prompt: 为这个模块写集成测试，测试多个组件的交互
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger - integration test, not fuzz test

evals.prompt: 这个代码有bug，帮我修复这个空指针问题
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger - bug fixing, not fuzz generation

evals.prompt: 帮我做性能测试，看看这个接口的响应时间
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger - performance test, not fuzz test

evals.prompt: 帮我review这段C++代码的质量，看看有什么改进建议
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger - general code review, not fuzz-specific review

evals.prompt: 帮我设计一个REST API接口
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger

evals.prompt: 为ConfigManager类生成fuzz测试用例，头文件在files/headers/synthetic/simple_class.h，命名空间是OHOS::Utils
evals.expected_output: Should generate complete 5-file fuzzer project (.cpp/.h/BUILD.gn/project.xml/corpus) with proper FuzzedDataProvider usage, explicit types, LLVMFuzzerInitialize, switch-case dispatch

evals.prompt: 为IDisplayService类生成fuzz测试用例，头文件在files/headers/synthetic/ipc_class.h，这是一个IPC接口，需要通过OnRemoteRequest测试stub
evals.expected_output: Should recognize IPC pattern (IRemoteBroker inheritance), generate stub fuzzer with OnRemoteRequest dispatch, MessageParcel construction, NOT generate proxy-style fuzzer

evals.prompt: 为ScreenManager类生成fuzz测试用例，头文件在files/headers/synthetic/complex_param_class.h，命名空间OHOS::Rosen
evals.expected_output: Should handle complex types properly: RSScreenModeInfo uses multi-field construction, std::vector uses loop consumption, sptr<Surface> uses Mock class, callbacks initialized as nullptr

evals.prompt: 为GraphicComposer类生成fuzz测试用例，头文件在files/headers/synthetic/enum_class.h，命名空间OHOS::Graphic
evals.expected_output: Should use uint8_t for enum consumption (rule 013), include ENUM_SIZE_MAP constants, use static_cast for enum conversion

evals.prompt: 为MemoryMonitor类生成fuzz测试用例，头文件在files/headers/synthetic/no_param_class.h
evals.expected_output: Should detect that all public methods have no parameters, reject fuzz generation per rule 001, suggest unit test instead

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/good/good_fuzzer.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should find minimal violations in well-written fuzzer code. May report low-severity items but should NOT flag false positives for correct patterns.

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/bad/data_extraction/bad_fuzzer_rand.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should detect rule 017 violation: rand()/srand() usage instead of FuzzedDataProvider

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/bad/data_extraction/bad_fuzzer_data_ptr.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should detect rule 018 violation: direct data pointer dereference *(int32_t*)data

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/bad/data_extraction/bad_fuzzer_size_misuse.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should detect rule 010 violation: size parameter passed as business input to API

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/bad/bad_fuzzer_uninit_global.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should detect rule 019 violation: global pointer declared as nullptr without LLVMFuzzerInitialize

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/bad/bad_fuzzer_auto.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should detect rule 016 violation: auto keyword for fuzz-derived variables

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/bad/bad_fuzzer_ipc_proxy.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should detect rule 007 violation: IPC proxy pattern without OnRemoteRequest

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/bad/bad_fuzzer_enum_uint32.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should detect rule 013 violation: uint32_t used for enum instead of uint8_t

evals.prompt: 为ConfigManager类生成完整的fuzz测试项目，从代码分析到最终交付
evals.expected_output: Should follow complete 6-phase workflow: 1) analyze header, 2) generate skeleton, 3) fill implementation, 4) generate seeds, 5) run rule check, 6) auto-fix if needed

evals.prompt: 检查这个已有的fuzz测试代码是否合规，不需要重新生成
evals.expected_output: Should skip to phase 5 (rule check) directly, not start from phase 1

evals.prompt: 为这个已有的fuzzer生成语义化种子数据
evals.expected_output: Should skip to phase 4 (seed generation), analyze parameter types, generate semantic seeds

evals.prompt: 为MemoryMonitor类生成fuzz测试用例
evals.expected_output: Should perform self-check questions: 1) has parameters? 2) is IPC? 3) >10 methods? 4) all output params? Should reject because no parameters

evals.prompt: 为RSRenderService类生成fuzz测试，头文件路径是rosen/modules/render_service.h，但这个文件不存在
evals.expected_output: Should handle header parse failure: check spelling, ask for correct path, offer manual parsing

evals.prompt: 为这个类生成fuzz测试，它有15个有参public方法
evals.expected_output: Should detect >10 methods per rule 006, suggest splitting into multiple fuzzer files

evals.prompt: 为DataExporter类生成fuzz测试，它的所有方法参数都是非const引用输出参数
evals.expected_output: Should detect that all parameters are output type (non-const refs), skip fuzz generation as no input needs fuzzing

evals.prompt: 检查并修复这个fuzz代码的问题，文件在files/fuzzers/bad/data_extraction/bad_fuzzer_rand.cpp，需要自动修复
evals.expected_output: Should detect rand() violation (rule 017), auto-fix by replacing rand() calls with fdp.ConsumeIntegral<T>(), add FuzzedDataProvider parameter

evals.prompt: 检查并修复这个fuzz代码的问题，文件在files/fuzzers/bad/bad_fuzzer_uninit_global.cpp，需要自动修复
evals.expected_output: Should detect uninitialized global pointer (rule 019), auto-fix by adding LLVMFuzzerInitialize function

evals.prompt: 检查并修复这个fuzz代码的问题，文件中缺少版权头
evals.expected_output: Should detect missing copyright header (rule F), auto-fix by adding Huawei Device Co., Ltd. copyright

evals.prompt: 检查并修复这个fuzz代码的所有问题，文件在files/fuzzers/bad/data_extraction/bad_fuzzer_rand.cpp，持续修复直到没有问题
evals.expected_output: Should attempt auto-fix up to max 3 rounds, then stop and output remaining violations for manual review

evals.prompt: 为ConfigManager类生成fuzz测试用例，这是一个简单类
evals.expected_output: Should NOT load all rule files at start, should only load violated rules during phase 5, must load rule 005 for complex params if needed

evals.prompt: 为ScreenManager类生成fuzz测试，参数类型包括ScreenId和RSScreenModeInfo，我需要了解如何构造这些类型
evals.expected_output: Should load tools/fuzz_generator.py to check TYPE_CONSUMER_MAP (ScreenId → uint64_t) and COMPLEX_TYPE_MAP (RSScreenModeInfo → multi-field construction)

evals.prompt: 为ConfigManager类生成fuzz测试用例
evals.expected_output: Should NOT load templates/fuzzer.cpp during normal generation - the tool handles template internally

evals.prompt: 为ConfigManager类生成fuzz测试用例，有些参数需要随机值
evals.expected_output: Should NEVER use rand()/random() - must use FuzzedDataProvider for all random data generation per rule 017

evals.prompt: 为ConfigManager类生成fuzz测试用例
evals.expected_output: Should NEVER use auto for fuzz-derived variables - must use explicit types like int32_t, std::string per rule 016

evals.prompt: 为ConfigManager类生成fuzz测试用例，size参数需要传给API
evals.expected_output: Should NEVER pass size as business input to API - size is determined by fuzz engine, not business logic per rule 010

evals.prompt: 为ConfigManager类生成fuzz测试用例，需要从data指针读取参数
evals.expected_output: Should NEVER directly dereference data pointer - must use FuzzedDataProvider per rule 018

evals.prompt: 为GraphicComposer类生成fuzz测试用例，包含枚举参数
evals.expected_output: Should NEVER use uint32_t for enum consumption - must use uint8_t for 1-byte mutation efficiency per rule 013

evals.prompt: 为ConfigManager类生成fuzz测试用例，使用全局对象实例
evals.expected_output: Should NEVER leave global pointer uninitialized - must add LLVMFuzzerInitialize per rule 019

evals.prompt: 为MemoryMonitor类生成fuzz测试
evals.expected_output: Should NEVER generate fuzz for no-param APIs - coverage will always be 0 per rule 001

evals.prompt: 为这个类生成fuzz测试，它有12个有参public方法
evals.expected_output: Should NEVER allow >10 methods in single fuzzer file per rule 006, must suggest splitting

evals.prompt: 为 RSInterfaces 类生成fuzz测试用例。这是一个IPC接口（继承IRemoteBroker），方法包括：SetScreenPowerStatus(ScreenId, ScreenPowerStatus), SetScreenCorrection(ScreenId, ScreenRotation), SetPixelFormat(ScreenId, GraphicPixelFormat), SetScreenColorGamut(ScreenId, int32_t), RegisterCallback(sptr<IDisplayCallback>), GetScreenSupportedColorGamuts(ScreenId, vector<GraphicColorGamut>&), SetScreenVsyncEnabled(bool), SetScreenColorTransform(vector<float>&), 共14个方法。命名空间OHOS::Rosen
evals.expected_output: Should detect IPC pattern (IRemoteBroker), split into 2 fuzzer files (>10 methods, rule 006), use stub OnRemoteRequest, ScreenId→uint64_t typedef, enums→uint8_t+%ENUM_SIZE, sptr→nullptr in parcel

evals.prompt: 为 HdiScreen 类生成fuzz测试用例。非IPC类，方法：SetScreenPowerStatus(GraphicDispPowerStatus), SetScreenColorGamut(GraphicColorGamut), SetScreenGamutMap(GraphicGamutMap), SetScreenVsyncEnabled(bool), SetScreenMode(uint32_t), SetScreenColorTransform(vector<float>). 命名空间OHOS::Rosen
evals.expected_output: Should use direct method calls (not IPC), GraphicDispPowerStatus→uint8_t%6, GraphicColorGamut→uint8_t%8, GraphicGamutMap→uint8_t%4, FDP exclusively, LLVMFuzzerInitialize

evals.prompt: 为 RSIWindowAnimationController 类生成fuzz测试用例。IPC接口继承IRemoteBroker，方法：OnStartApp(StartingAppType, sptr<RSWindowAnimationTarget>, sptr<RSIWindowAnimationFinishedCallback>), OnMinimizeAllWindow(vector<sptr<RSWindowAnimationTarget>>, sptr<RSIWindowAnimationFinishedCallback>), OnWallpaperUpdate(sptr<RSWindowAnimationTarget>). 共9个方法。命名空间OHOS::Rosen
evals.expected_output: Should use IPC stub pattern, OnRemoteRequest, sptr→nullptr in parcel, StartingAppType→uint8_t%3, vector<sptr>→uint8_t count%32 + nullptr loop

evals.prompt: 为 RSIBufferAvailableCallback 类生成fuzz测试用例。IPC接口继承IRemoteBroker，唯一方法OnBufferAvailable()无参数。命名空间OHOS::Rosen
evals.expected_output: Should reject or note that no meaningful fuzzable input exists for direct method, but IPC stub can still fuzz message code+parcel. Primary: reject direct method fuzz per rule 001.

evals.prompt: 为 RSScreenChangeCallback 类生成fuzz测试用例。非IPC类，方法：OnScreenConnect(ScreenId), OnScreenDisconnect(ScreenId), OnScreenChange(ScreenId, ScreenChangeReason)。命名空间OHOS::Rosen
evals.expected_output: Should use direct method calls, ScreenId→uint64_t typedef, ScreenChangeReason not in ENUM_SIZE_MAP→MUST check header file or load tools/fuzz_generator.py

evals.prompt: 检查以下fuzz代码是否符合安全编码规范。代码使用GetData<T>模板而非FuzzedDataProvider，枚举用uint32_t读取，无LLVMFuzzerInitialize，全局指针data_=nullptr，使用memcpy_s(data_+pos)直接访问data指针
evals.expected_output: Should detect: rule 013 (enum uint32_t), rule 017/019 (no LLVMFuzzerInitialize), rule 018 (data pointer access), rule 016 (auto usage), ScreenId type mapping error

evals.prompt: 为 RSIClientToServiceConnection 类生成fuzz测试用例，使用Parcel的WriteBuffer和Read方法来消费数据
evals.expected_output: Should NEVER use Parcel-based data consumption - MUST use FuzzedDataProvider exclusively. Parcel read methods are for IPC serialization, not fuzz data consumption.

evals.prompt: 为 IDisplayService 类生成fuzz测试，创建DisplayServiceProxy对象测试proxy端方法
evals.expected_output: Should NEVER fuzz IPC proxy - MUST fuzz stub OnRemoteRequest per rule 007

evals.prompt: 检查这个BUILD.gn文件是否符合fuzz测试格式规范，文件在files/configs/BUILD_gn_bad.gn
evals.expected_output: Should detect rule B violations: missing copyright header, missing import statement, wrong target naming convention

evals.prompt: 检查这个BUILD.gn文件是否符合fuzz测试格式规范，文件在files/configs/BUILD_gn_good.gn
evals.expected_output: Should pass all format rules (A-G)

evals.prompt: 检查这个project.xml文件是否符合fuzz测试格式规范，文件在files/configs/project_xml_bad.xml
evals.expected_output: Should detect rule C violations: wrong root element <config> instead of <fuzz_config>, missing XML declaration, missing max_len/max_total_time/rss_limit_mb, wrong project_name format

evals.prompt: 检查这个project.xml文件是否符合fuzz测试格式规范，文件在files/configs/project_xml_good.xml
evals.expected_output: Should pass all format rules for project.xml

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzzer头文件是否符合格式规范，文件在files/configs/fuzzer_header_bad.h
evals.expected_output: Should detect rule A violations: missing #ifndef guard, missing FUZZ_PROJECT_NAME, missing system includes, using namespace

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzzer头文件是否符合格式规范，文件在files/configs/fuzzer_header_good.h
evals.expected_output: Should pass all format rules for fuzzer header

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/bad/data_extraction/bad_fuzzer_fixed_params.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should detect rule 014 violation: hardcoded fixed values instead of fdp-derived data

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/bad/data_extraction/bad_fuzzer_unused_mutation.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should detect rule 003 violation: FDP declared but no Consume* calls

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/bad/data_extraction/bad_fuzzer_data_reuse.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should detect rule 004 violation: same fdp variable reused for multiple API calls

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/bad/bad_fuzzer_intermediate.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should detect rule 015 violation: unnecessary encode→decode before API call

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/bad/bad_fuzzer_driver_bug.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should detect rule 009 violations: integer overflow, potential OOM, out-of-bounds read, memory leak

evals.prompt: 为 IBufferProducer 类生成fuzz测试用例。这是一个IPC接口（继承IRemoteBroker），方法包括：RequestBuffer(sptr<SurfaceBuffer>, BufferRequestConfig, RequestBufferReturnValue), FlushBuffer(sptr<SurfaceBuffer>, sptr<SyncFence>, BufferFlushConfigWithDamages), SetTransform(GraphicTransformType), SetScalingMode(ScalingMode), GetLastFlushedBuffer(sptr<SurfaceBuffer>&, sptr<SyncFence>&, uint32_t&), 等35个方法。命名空间OHOS
evals.expected_output: Should detect IPC pattern, suggest splitting into 3+ fuzzer files (>10 methods), use stub OnRemoteRequest, handle RequestBufferReturnValue struct (with sptr fields), use GraphicTransformType/ScalingMode enums from ENUM_SIZE_MAP

evals.prompt: 为 IEngine 类生成fuzz测试用例。非IPC类，方法包括：Initialize(std::string, PlatformData), SetupBackground(BackgroundType), AddGeometry(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<Geometry>>), AddAnimation(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<GLTFAnimation>>), OnWindowChange(std::shared_ptr<RSUIContext>, WindowChangeInfo, std::string), UpdatePointerEvent(PointerEvent)。共约15方法。命名空间OHOS::Render3D
evals.expected_output: Should use direct method calls (non-IPC), handle BackgroundType enum→uint8_t, handle vector<shared_ptr<>>, handle WindowChangeInfo struct, handle shared_ptr mock pattern

evals.prompt: 为 IDisplayManagerAgent 类生成fuzz测试用例。IPC接口继承IRemoteBroker，方法包括：OnScreenConnect(sptr<ScreenInfo>), OnScreenDisconnect(sptr<ScreenInfo>), OnScreenChange(sptr<ScreenChangeInfo>, ScreenChangeEvent), OnDisplayCreate(sptr<DisplayInfo>), OnDisplayDestroy(DisplayId), OnDisplayChange(sptr<DisplayChangeInfo>, DisplayChangeEvent), OnDisplayPowerEvent(DisplayPowerEvent, EventStatus), 等21个通知方法。命名空间OHOS::Rosen
evals.expected_output: Should detect IPC pattern, suggest splitting into 3 fuzzer files (>10 methods), use stub OnRemoteRequest, handle DisplayManagerAgentType enum(17 values), handle sptr<ScreenInfo>/sptr<DisplayInfo> in parcel as nullptr

evals.prompt: 为 ShaderEffect 类生成fuzz测试用例。非IPC类，方法为静态工厂方法：CreateBlurImageFilter(float, float, ImageBlurType, std::shared_ptr<ImageFilter>), CreateColorFilterImageFilter(std::shared_ptr<ColorFilter>), CreateOffsetImageFilter(float, float, std::shared_ptr<ImageFilter>), CreateComposeImageFilter(std::shared_ptr<ImageFilter>, std::shared_ptr<ImageFilter>), CreateGradientBlurImageFilter(float, float, GradientBlurType, GradientDir, std::vector<std::pair<float,float>>), CreateArithmeticImageFilter(std::vector<scalar>, std::shared_ptr<ImageFilter>), 等。命名空间OHOS::Rosen::Drawing
evals.expected_output: Should handle factory method pattern (static Create* methods), handle ShaderEffectType enum→uint8_t, handle shared_ptr<ImageFilter>→nullptr or mock, handle vector<pair<float,float>> pattern, handle ImageBlurType/GradientBlurType enums

evals.prompt: 为 IRSComposerToRenderConnection 类生成fuzz测试用例。IPC接口继承IRemoteBroker，方法包括：RegisterReleaseLayerBuffersCB(std::function<void(ReleaseLayerBuffersInfo&)>), RegisterJudgeLppLayerCB(std::function<void(uint64_t, unordered_set<uint64_t>&)>), RegisterLayerStateChangedCB(std::function<void(uint64_t, LayerStateChange, uint64_t)>), ExecuteRenderLayer(RSLayerId, sptr<SurfaceBuffer>, sptr<SyncFence>), 等7方法。命名空间OHOS::Rosen
evals.expected_output: Should detect IPC pattern, use stub OnRemoteRequest, handle std::function callback params→nullptr in parcel, handle ReleaseLayerBuffersInfo struct (with vector<tuple>), handle unordered_set<uint64_t>→skip or simplified

evals.prompt: 检查这个IPC stub fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/good/good_fuzzer_ipc_stub.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should find minimal violations in well-written IPC stub fuzzer code. Should NOT flag OnRemoteRequest, MessageParcel, LLVMFuzzerInitialize as violations.

evals.prompt: 检查这个单例模式fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/good/good_fuzzer_singleton.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should find minimal violations in well-written singleton fuzzer with LLVMFuzzerInitialize and explicit types

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/real_ohos/2d/rsanimationcommand_fuzzer.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should detect GetData/data_ pattern violation, auto declarations, no LLVMFuzzerInitialize, namespace-level mutable globals

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/real_ohos/effect/ge_kawase_blur_shader_filter_fuzzer.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should detect pattern inconsistency (mixing FDP and GetPlainData), auto declarations, no LLVMFuzzerInitialize

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/real_ohos/surface/nativewindow_fuzzer.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should detect int32_t enum casting (OHSurfaceSource, OHScalingMode, OH_NativeBuffer_TransformType), auto declarations

evals.prompt: 检查这个IPC stub fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/real_ohos/wm/windowstubget_fuzzer.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should detect uint32_t casting for IPC message codes, raw data pattern (no FDP), IPC stub pattern (correct structure but with violations)

evals.prompt: 检查这个fuzz测试代码是否符合安全编码规范，文件在files/fuzzers/real_ohos/2d/rsmemorymanager001_fuzzer.cpp
evals.expected_output: Should find minimal violations in this mostly-compliant real fuzzer. Should NOT false-positive on LLVMFuzzerInitialize, FDP usage, uint8_t dispatch
